result.stdout:
Lucewave - Multi-phase source generator pipeline orchestrator

Usage: lucewave <command> [options]

Commands:
  run       Run the generator pipeline
  init      Initialize a new pipeline configuration
  cache     Manage pipeline cache
  help      Show this help
  version   Show version information

Run 'lucewave <command> --help' for more information on a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: lucewave init [options]

Options:
  -t, --template <name>  Template to use (basic, advanced) (default: basic)
  -h, --help             Show this help

commands.payload:
Usage: lucewave init [options]

Options:
  -t, --template <name>  Template to use (basic, advanced) (default: basic)
  -h, --help             Show this help

result.stdout:
Usage: lucewave run [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <file>    Path to the pipeline configuration file (default: generator-pipeline.yml)
  -p, --project <dir>    Path to the project directory (default: current directory)
  -o, --output <dir>     Output directory for generated files
  -v, --verbose          Enable verbose output
  --no-cache             Disable caching
  -h, --help             Show this help

  -p, --project <dir>    Path to the project directory (default: current directory)
  -o, --output <dir>     Output directory for generated files
  -v, --verbose          Enable verbose output
  --no-cache             Disable caching
  -h, --help             Show this help
